content_original: Pengukuran speed dari GPS juga ada keterbatasan kepresisiannya bang Fitra. Bila yang akses satelite GPS saat itu banyak/
content_english: Measuring speed from GPS also has limited precision, Fitra. If there are a lot of GPS satellites accessing at the time or at the same time or the weather is overcast and cloudy while the number of satellites available is limited (3-4 satellites, ideally at least 12 satellites) then the precision is reduced, it could be that what is shown on the dashboard is more precise by noting that the tires are relatively new because the speed indication on the dashboard is one of the variables is the tire diameter. That's why if the tires are changed from the manufacturer's standards, there must be a designation adjustment. This also affects the calculation of the effectiveness of the ABS function from the dislatation distance (because ABS uses variable rotation)

content_original: betul, akurasi GPS, biasanya antara 1,5 s/d 3 meter, bahkan bisa sampai 10 meter, tergantung pada solid/tidaknya sinyal
content_english: That's right, GPS accuracy is usually between 1.5 to 3 meters, and can even be up to 10 meters, depending on whether the satellite signal is solid or not.
